conversations.content:
I will be arriving in Paris on Sunday. Can you please provide me the the name of a restaurant which serves French cuisine that open on Sunday? Recommend me the restaurant with the best rating.
Tell me the restaurant name, rating, address, and the operating hours.

<function_thought>
I need to gather information about restaurants in Paris. As the user is looking for French cuisine restaurants that are open on Sunday, I will first retrieve a list of all restaurants in Paris. Once I have that list, I will check their cuisine types, check their opening hours, get ratings and reviews for the restaurants, and finally get their addresses to provide a complete response. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_all_restaurants_in_city(city="Paris")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Breizh Café
New Asiaway
Le Baratin
Bistrot Paul Bert
Royal Panda
The yard
China Garden
Miznon
Chez L'Ami Jean
